mappings.blocker: No legacy Vercel key for Aliyun access key id. Operator-only: vercel-ops rediscovery on legacy website prj_pTBArlyTCa46sVq6n9R8enGIdho8 production env found exactly these 13 keys (DASHSCOPE_API_KEY, NEXT_PUBLIC_OCEANLEO_ANON_KEY, NEXT_PUBLIC_OCEANLEO_GATEWAY_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_OCEANLEO_SUPABASE_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, OCEANLEO_PLATFORM_SSH_HOST, OCEANLEO_PLATFORM_SSH_PORT, OCEANLEO_PLATFORM_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY, OCEANLEO_PLATFORM_SSH_USER, OPENAI_API_KEY, OPENAI_BASE_URL, OPENAI_MODEL); none maps to this WEBSITE_* runtime secret. Legacy runtime stores per-user provider credentials in encrypted vault_entries. Operator helpers (vercel-ops/cf/aliyun-sg/supabase-sql/host-gh) are different principals and are not accepted as mapping sources. An operator must supply the target value out-of-band.
